text: Repeated exposure to α-diketones might result in the loss of the regenerative capacity of the airway epithelium, e.g. due to insufficient residual stem cells. Sustained loss of the epithelial cells might lead to damage to the underlying basement membrane and exposure of the lamina propria. Fibroblast in the lamina propria are activated and start to proliferate and elaborate collagen matrix. Cytokines and growth factors released by epithelial cells and infiltrated neutrophils may promote the migration and proliferation of fibroblasts into the airway lumen. The initially fibromyxoid tissue is gradually replaced by mature connective tissue that is rich in collagen (rats, Flake & Morgan 2017).
